name: Mayur Unagar
summary: Motivated and detail-oriented developer with hands-on experience designing, developing, and maintaining responsive, SEO-friendly WordPress websites. Currently interning in AI, building and fine-tuning machine learning models end to end. Comfortable across WordPress theme customization, plugin integration, database management, and e-commerce functionality. Passionate about learning new technologies and creating high-quality web and AI-driven experiences.
